one_line_verdict: A breezy romantic comedy tailor-made for fans of sun-drenched European love stories — perfectly enjoyable on streaming, but Tuscany's gorgeous scenery gives it a slight edge on the big screen.
english_note: Italian-accented English from leads; some culturally specific humor and light wordplay throughout.
credits_detail: No credits scene — feel free to leave once the final frame fades. (Speculative based on genre conventions.)
one_line_summary: A charming mistaken-identity rom-com soaked in Tuscan sunshine and unexpected love.
